items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-95 northbound between Exit 19: I-76 EAST - WALT WHITMAN BR/PACKER AVE and 1 miles NORTH of Exit 19: I-76 EAST - WALT WHITMAN BR/PACKER AVE. There is a lane restriction.
